Claim Diagnosis Code 1–13 Diagnosis Version Code (ICD-9 or ICD-10) 

DESCRIPTION: Effective with Version 'J', the code used to indicate if the diagnosis code (for the ICD_DGNS_CD1–13 
fields) is ICD-9 orICD-10. 

SHORT NAME: ICD_DGNS_VRSN_CD1 
ICD_DGNS_VRSN_CD2 
ICD_DGNS_VRSN_CD3

ICD_DGNS_VRSN_CD13
